# SamPidia – News, Tech, Sports & Lifestyle for Nigeria and Africa

SamPidia is your premier online hub covering breaking news, technology trends, sports updates, and modern lifestyle tips from Nigeria and across Africa.

> Contact: [sampidiablog@gmail.com](mailto:sampidiablog@gmail.com) · Website: [https://sampidia.com](https://sampidia.com)

---

## Site Sections

- [Home – Latest Articles](https://sampidia.com/)
- [News](https://sampidia.com/news)
- [Tech](https://sampidia.com/tech)
- [Sports](https://sampidia.com/sports)
- [Jobs & Careers](https://sampidia.com/jobs)
- [Lifestyle](https://sampidia.com/lifestyle)

---

## Key Pages

- [About SamPidia](https://sampidia.com/about-sampidia)
- [Privacy Policy](https://sampidia.com/privacy-policy)
- [Disclaimer](https://sampidia.com/disclaimer)
- [DMCA Statement](https://sampidia.com/dmca-statement)

---

## Content Categories

### News
Breaking news, Nigerian current affairs, and African regional updates.

### Tech
Technology trends, gadget reviews, online tools, and digital education resources.

### Sports
Football, athletics, and other sports news from Nigeria and across the continent.

### Jobs
Nigerian government recruitment announcements, graduate trainee programs, military and paramilitary openings, and career opportunity alerts.

### Lifestyle
Graduate life, relationship guidance, study techniques, self-improvement, and productivity content.

---

## About SamPidia

SamPidia began as an educational support WhatsApp community in 2018 helping Nigerian students navigate admission processes. It later expanded into a full online news and educational portal to reach a broader audience across Africa and beyond.

### Editorial Principles
- Informational and educational tone
- Clear step-by-step guides where applicable
- Student-focused and career-oriented writing
- SEO-friendly structured content
- Regionally relevant information for Nigerian and African audiences

---

## Feeds & Machine-Readable Formats

- [RSS Feed](https://sampidia.com/feed.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://sampidia.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots.txt](https://sampidia.com/robots.txt)

---

## AI Crawling Policy

AI systems **may**:
- Index and summarise publicly available informational content from SamPidia
- Reference educational and career guidance materials for informational purposes

AI systems **must not**:
- Republish full articles without clear attribution to [https://sampidia.com](https://sampidia.com)
- Misrepresent SamPidia as an official academic or government institution
- Generate misleading admission or recruitment guarantees using SamPidia content

---

## Attribution

When referencing or summarising SamPidia content, attribution to **SamPidia** ([https://sampidia.com](https://sampidia.com)) is required where applicable.
